title: Snowflake Snow Day — Ball Horticultural
description: Snow Day / technical discovery deck pattern — use cases, demos, services delivery approach, path forward

slides.title: Initial AI Use Cases
slides.subtitle: Priority workloads identified for this engagement

pillars.title: Preliminary & Final Forecasting
bullets: ML pipelines for seasonal demand prediction
Replace 7+ tab Excel workbooks with Snowflake-native model
Dynamic context for anomalies vs. 3-year historical average

pillars.title: Pricing Execution
bullets: Automate SAP pricing entry at scale across all SKUs
Eliminate requoting treadmill from cost/FX changes
Turnkey SAP integration saving thousands of hours annually

pillars.title: SAP Order Confirmation
bullets: Document AI to parse supplier PDF confirmations
Auto-match to SAP ZORS table, eliminating manual entry
Notifications auto-triggered to customer, rep, supplier

phases.title: Phase 1: Co-Build
phases.description: Snowflake PS + customer builds priority use cases together to ensure success.
activities: Establish ingestion pattern from Fabric/existing source, bringing in use case-specific data
Build ML models, semantic views and Cortex Analyst/Search models
Cortex Code & MLOps training for customer team

phases.title: Phase 2: Replicate
phases.description: Customer leads subsequent use cases, Snowflake PS rides shotgun.
activities: Bring in additional data from repeatable patterns
Explore additional Snowflake features with Snowflake PS during subsequent use case delivery
Customer leverages Cortex Code to accelerate build
Increase working patterns and build self-sufficient AI CoE
phases.outcome: Increase working patterns & build self-sufficient AI CoE

phases.title: Phase 3: Scale
phases.description: Customer owns the platform and drives new AI use cases independently.
activities: New use cases delivered by internal team
Platform operations fully owned by customer
Extend to new business domains & data sources

cards.title: Enable Use Cases
cards.body: Identify opportunities and recommend new ways to use Snowflake

cards.title: Shorten Time to Value
cards.body: Enable you to see results faster after initial Snowflake deployment

cards.title: Maximize Efficiency
cards.body: Knowledge transfer to help you use Snowflake fully and efficiently

cards.title: Rely on Experienced Help
cards.body: Rely on a team with the depth of experience you need

cards.title: Mitigate Risk
cards.body: Reduce the chances of migration issues and mis-adoption

cards.title: Ensure Success
cards.body: Experience delivering Snowflake transformation across dozens of organizations
